record.sourceCode:
n = int(input())
coeffs = list(map(int, input().split()))
result = []
is_first = True

for i in range(n + 1):
    coeff = coeffs[i]
    degree = n - i
    if coeff == 0:
        continue
    # 处理符号
    if is_first:
        sign = '-' if coeff < 0 else ''
        is_first = False
    else:
        sign = '+' if coeff > 0 else '-'
    # 处理系数和次数部分
    abs_coeff = abs(coeff)
    if degree == 0:
        term = str(abs_coeff)
    else:
        term = '' if abs_coeff == 1 else str(abs_coeff)
    # 构建当前项的部分
    if degree == 0:
        part = term
    elif degree == 1:
        part = term + 'x'
    else:
        part = term + 'x^' + str(degree)
    # 合并符号和部分
    result.append(sign + part)

print(''.join(result))

problem.title: [NOIP 2009 普及组] 多项式输出
